title: CLA6-15.1.0.159SP01-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.2.129-OP001PF001AZ_20251016111657
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
CLA6-15.1.2.129(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Phone Cast: Added the feature to cast your phone screen to a tablet of the same brand. This allows you to enjoy a larger screen experience for work or entertainment, with the ability to view and operate your phone and seamlessly copy-paste text across devices.
2. AI Writing: Supported intelligent recognition of email contexts for automatic optimization of format and content. Provided scenario-based text polishing for social media posts.
3. Screenshot: Added a Smart Touch shortcut below the screenshot thumbnail, allowing easy recognition of QR codes on the page.
4. Battery and Power Saving: Enhanced visual design, simplified mode selection process, and improved the user experience.
5. Theme Store: Allowed changing theme designs for system apps like Phone, Contacts, and Messages.
6. Updated Google Security Patch to October 1, 2025.

Fixed Issues:
1. Enhanced the smoothness of app launch and exit on the system home screen.
2. Improved the headphone connection pop-up experience with a lightweight notification that now displays the charging case battery level.
3. Updated the font package to address overlapping display for some fonts.
4. Fixed the occasional issue of failing to display the wallpaper in time after successful fingerprint unlocking.
5. Raise to Wake: Optimized for the issue of accidental screen wake-up in some scenarios.
6. Mistouch Prevention for Pocket Mode: Optimized for the accidental touch issue in pocket mode during calls on third-party apps.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (https://tspot.tecno.com) for more information.
